name: Candidate Triage v0.2.1 - Precedence Fix Test

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  page_title AS title,
  website AS url,
  page_snippet AS snippet,
  company_name,
  country,
  industry,
  source,
  source_url,
  search_query,
  candidate_status
FROM candidate_leads
WHERE candidate_status = $1
ORDER BY discovered_at ASC
LIMIT $2;

UPDATE candidate_leads
SET
  relevance_score = $1,
  candidate_status = $2,
  review_notes = $3,
  reviewed_at = $4
WHERE id = $5
RETURNING
  id,
  page_title AS title,
  website AS url,
  relevance_score,
  candidate_status,
  review_notes,
  reviewed_at;
